volumeHelp:
#
Pāwhiri kia uru atu ki te pae rōrahi
volumeUpDown:
#
Whakanuia me te whakaheke i te rōrahi
statusUsingDesc:
#
Ma te whakamahi i te putanga ororongo kua whakaahuatia
statusLoadingDesc:
#
Te uta i te putanga me te whakaahuatanga ororongo
statusUsingNoDesc:
#
Te whakamahi i te putanga kaore he whakaahuatanga ororongo
statusLoadingNoDesc:
#
Ka utaina te putanga kaore he whakaahuatanga ororongo
statusLoadingNext:
#
E uta ana i te riu panuku
alertDescribedVersion:
#
Ma te whakamahi i te putanga ororongo o te ataata
alertNonDescribedVersion:
#
Ma te whakamahi i te putanga kaore he whakaahuatanga oro o te ataata
fallbackError2:
#
Ko nga kaitirotiro e whai ake nei he hototahi ki tenei kaitakaro
prefIntroCaptions:
#
Ko nga manakohanga e whai ake nei e whakahaere ana me pehea te whakaatu i nga kupu hauraro.
prefIntroDescription1:
#
Ka tautokohia e tenei kaitakaro te whakaahuatanga ororongo ma nga huarahi e rua:
prefIntroDescription2:
#
Ko te ataata o naianei kua
prefIntroDescriptionNone:
#
Ko te ataata o naianei kaore he whakaahuatanga ororongo i roto i tetahi whakatakotoranga.
prefIntroDescription3:
#
Whakamahia te puka i raro nei hei whakarite i o hiahia mo te whakaahuatanga ororongo i roto i te tuhinga.
prefIntroDescription4:
#
I muri i te tiaki i nga tautuhinga, ka taea e koe te whakaweto i te whakaahuatanga ororongo me te paatene ano.
prefIntroKeyboard1:
#
Ka taea te whakahaere i te kaitakaro o tenei wharangi mai i nga waahi katoa ma te whakamahi i nga pokatata papapātuhi (tirohia te rarangi kei raro nei).
prefIntroKeyboard2:
#
Ka taea e koe te tautuhi i nga taviri whakarereke (Alt, Mana me/ranei Neke).
prefIntroKeyboard3:
#
FAKATOKANGA: Ka taupatupatu etahi huinga matua ki era e whakamahia ana e to kaitirotiro me etahi atu tono. Whakamātauria nga huinga rereke me nga taviri whakarereke kia kitea ra ano nga mea tika mo koe.
prefIntroTranscript:
#
Ko nga manakohanga e whai ake nei ka pa ki te whakawhitinga tauwhitiwhiti.
prefCookieWarning:
#
Hei tiaki i o hiahia me whakamahi pihikete.
prefHeadingKeyboard1:
#
Ko nga taviri whakarereke ka whakamahia hei pokatata papapātuhi
prefHeadingTextDescription:
#
Whakaahuatanga ororongo i roto i te kuputuhi
escapeKeyFunction:
#
Katia te korero o naianei, te pakūake ranei
prefDescFormatHelp:
#
Mena kei te waatea nga whakatakotoranga e rua, kotahi anake ka whakamahia.
prefDescFormatOption1:
#
Ataata rereke me te whakamaarama ororongo whakauru (i mua i tuhia).
prefDescFormatOption1b:
#
he putanga rereke me te whakaahuatanga ororongo
prefDescFormatOption2:
#
Whakaahuatanga kupu panui e te kaipanui mata (TTS)
prefDescFormatOption2b:
#
whakaahuatanga i roto i te tuhinga
prefDescPause:
#
Tatari aunoa i te ataata ina timata te whakaahuatanga
prefDescVisible:
#
Whakaatuhia te whakaahuatanga i roto i te kuputuhi ki te whakahohea
sampleDescriptionText:
#
Whakaritehia o tautuhinga kia rongo i tenei tauira kuputuhi.
prefHighlight:
#
Miramirahia te tuhinga i te wa e ahu whakamua ana te ihirangi
windowMoveLeft:
#
I neke te Matapihi ki te taha maui
windowMoveRight:
#
I neke te matapihi ki te taha matau
windowMoveDown:
#
I neke te matapihi ki raro
windowMoveStopped:
#
Kua mutu te nekehanga o te matapihi
windowMoveAlert:
#
Tōia, whakamahia rānei ngā kī pere hei nuku i te matapihi; Patohia te Enter kia mutu.
windowResizeAlert:
#
Kua huri te rahi o te matapihi.
windowSendBackAlert:
#
Ko tenei matapihi kaore i muri i tetahi mea.
windowBringTopAlert:
#
Ko tenei matapihi kei mua i te toenga o nga mea kei te wharangi.
resultsSummary4:
#
Paatohia te wa e pa ana ki tetahi mea hei purei i te ataata mai i tera waahi.
webEditionDescription:
#
Putanga kua whakaritea me te whakawhänuihia o te kaitoi pāpāho e waatea ana ki a Able Player. Ko nga whakarereketanga me etahi atu mahi i whakawhanakehia e TOTHOMweb he pūmanawa rangatira.
wpEditionDescription:
#
Ko te mono WordPress e taapiri ana i tetahi widget ki te Elementor, i hangaia hei whakauru i tetahi putanga kua whakaritea me te whakawhanui o te kaitoro pāpāho e waatea ana ki a Able Player. Ko nga whakarereketanga me etahi atu mahi i whakawhanakehia e TOTHOMweb he pūmanawa rangatira.
thirdPartyDescription:
#
Kei roto i tenei hua nga punaha punaha tuwhera e whai ake nei:
distributedUnder:
#
Ka tohatohahia i raro i nga tikanga o te
